Badges.empty_description: Take the placement test to discover your proficiency.
Badges.en_A1_desc: You can understand and use familiar everyday expressions and basic phrases.
Badges.en_A1_quote: The book is on the table. You are welcome. Very happy.
Badges.en_A2_desc: You understand isolated phrases and frequent expressions related to areas of immediate relevance.
Badges.en_A2_quote: In my house in Miami, Chris Brown said: Naldo, your style is incredible!
Badges.en_B1_desc: You are able to handle most situations that may arise during a trip to a place where the language is spoken.
Badges.en_B1_quote: I'm very happy for the goals. Prruuuu!
Badges.en_B2_desc: You understand the main ideas of complex texts on concrete and abstract topics.
Badges.en_B2_quote: It's true! I love to speak with people, even with my accent.
Badges.en_C1_desc: You understand a wide spectrum of long and demanding texts, recognizing implicit meanings.
Badges.en_C1_quote: Don't let the samba die. Fluency is the soul of the business.
Badges.en_C2_desc: You understand effortlessly virtually everything you hear or read.
Badges.en_C2_quote: Fluent and funny. The perfect combination for the top.
Badges.pt_A1_desc: Confident with zero vocabulary. Says 'obrigado' with an impossible accent and thinks 'saudade' is a typical dish.
Badges.pt_A1_quote: I'm the best at Portuguese. I am fluent. Boa… tarde? See? Fluent.
Badges.pt_A2_desc: Enthusiastic, hardworking, understands half of everything. Orders food at a restaurant but gets something completely different.
Badges.pt_A2_quote: Are you ready, kids? Porque eu aprendi como pedir… pão de queijo!
Badges.pt_B1_desc: Not the fastest, but handles any situation. Follows the novela and can explain what happened in the last episode.
Badges.pt_B1_quote: Mamãe always said Portuguese is like a box of chocolates — você nunca sabe o que vai falar.
Badges.pt_B2_desc: Speaks with an accent but everyone understands. Gets jokes, sarcasm and wins over any Brazilian in conversation.
Badges.pt_B2_quote: Como você está? How YOU doin'? — works in both languages, amigo.
Badges.pt_C1_desc: Precise, calm and commanding. Brazilians think you're from another state, not another country. Uses subjunctive for fun.
Badges.pt_C1_quote: Eu não sou em perigo, Skyler. Eu SOU o perigo. E meu português é impecável.
Badges.pt_C2_desc: Reads Machado de Assis for pleasure. Understands a Gaúcho and a Nordestino in the same conversation.
Badges.pt_C2_quote: And so he learned the Portuguese language — not as a foreigner, but as a soul that always knew the way.
Badges.vault_desc_en: Meet the icons that represent each stage of your fluency in English.
Badges.vault_desc_generic: See who you become at each stage of your journey in {language}.
Badges.vault_desc_pt: See who you become at each stage of your journey in Portuguese.

ProgressHero.description: Keep it up! Every class and practice session brings you closer to fluency.
ProgressHero.title: Your Progress

StudentImmersion.title: My Immersion
StudentImmersion.subtitle: Practice your listening and reading skills.
StudentImmersion.podcastsDescription: Learn by listening. Handpicked episodes for your level.
StudentImmersion.blogDescription: Daily articles and short stories to expand your vocabulary.

Comparison.description: You've tried learning with apps and gave up. Or you took generic classes that went nowhere. We know — and we've created something entirely different.

apps.problems: Repetitive exercises,Memorizing isolated words,No real follow-up,90% give up halfway
apps.solutions: Learn how you learned Portuguese,No forced memorization,Dedicated tutor who knows you,Anti-dropout planning
apps.title: Apps (Duolingo, Babbel)

marketplaces.problems: Each class is isolated,No structured curriculum,You have to manage everything
marketplaces.solutions: Plan made 100% for you,Schedule based on your objectives,We manage your learning
marketplaces.title: Marketplaces (Preply, iTalki)

traditional.problems: Fixed-pace classes,Generic content for everyone,Inflexible schedules
traditional.solutions: Pace adapted to you,Themes you enjoy,Schedules that work for you
traditional.title: Traditional Schools

Comparison.title: Why is Fluency Lab different?

brand.description: Transforming language learning into a natural, human experience adapted to your pace.

LandingPage.heroSubtitle:
A platform that follows
every step of your progress. Simple as that.

complete.description: Everything you learn is recorded on our platform: mastered vocabulary, studied topics, evolution over time. Plus: there are recorded video lessons for you to review any subject whenever you want.
complete.subtitle: See your progress happening
complete.title: Complete Platform

dedicated.description: It's not just 'book a class and goodbye'. Your tutor knows you, remembers your goals, adjusts the plan when needed, and provides a thought-out service to keep you going. It's like having a personal trainer for the language.
dedicated.subtitle: We don't let you give up
dedicated.title: Dedicated Tutors

natural.description: Do you know how you learned your first language? Without memorizing conjugations and vocabulary lists. Our method is the same: you acquire the language naturally, through real conversations, context, and immersion. No boring flashcards.
natural.subtitle: Learn without memorizing
natural.title: Natural Method

personalized.description: No 'standard' classes here. We build a unique study plan for you: based on your current level, your goals (travel? work? exam?), your deadlines, and even the subjects you enjoy. Want to learn English talking about technology? Let's go.
personalized.subtitle: Your schedule, your goals
personalized.title: Personalized Plan

LandingPage.subtitle: Personalized classes with dedicated tutors, natural method without rote memorization.

Team.cta: I want to book a trial lesson
Team.description: Dedicated tutors ready to personalize your learning journey based on your real goals. We aren't just teachers, we are partners in your evolution.

deise.bio: Course coordinator, manages the school and the teachers.
deise.name: Deise Laiane

luara.bio: English teacher with years of experience, focusing on adult students.
luara.name: Luara

gideon.bio: Native English teacher, focused on conversation and practical fluency.
gideon.name: Gideon

giulia.bio: English teacher, focusing on kids and teenagers.
giulia.name: Giulia

Team.title: Meet our team of <primary>professionals</primary>

LandingPage.title: Learn a language for real, without giving up halfway

overview.title: Your Fluency Profile
overview.description: See your account summary, current proficiency, and ELO level.
overview.content1: Here you can track your overall progress and communication development.
overview.item1: <strongNode>Real-Time Metrics:</strongNode> Your estimated proficiency level and accumulated study hours.
overview.item2: <strongNode>Onboarding Steps:</strongNode> Check if you still need to sign the contract or complete the initial placement test.

nextClass.title: Live Classes (Video)
nextClass.description: How to access your classes with the teacher at the scheduled time.
nextClass.content1: Online classes take place 100% integrated into the platform:
nextClass.item1: <strongNode>No External Links:</strongNode> You do not need Zoom or Google Meet. At the class time, the next class card will display the <strongNode>Access Room</strongNode> button.
nextClass.item2: <strongNode>Quick Access:</strongNode> Simply click the button to enter the video call and open the corresponding class notebook.

badges.title: Proficiency Levels (CEFR)
badges.description: Understand the achievements and badges from the Common European Framework of Reference.
badges.content1: The badges on your profile represent your current level in the target language:
badges.item1: <strongNode>Click the Badges:</strongNode> Clicking on the badges opens a complete panel describing what each level (from A1 to C2) means for your conversation skills.
badges.item2: <strongNode>Evolution:</strongNode> As you complete new placement tests, your badges and descriptions will be updated automatically.

streak.title: Daily Practice and Streak
streak.description: Maintain your study rhythm and track your consistency.
streak.content1: Consistency is key to long-term fluency:
streak.item1: <strongNode>Streak Count:</strongNode> The number of consecutive days you have practiced. Don't let the fire go out!
streak.item2: <strongNode>Practice Status:</strongNode> Indicates whether you have already completed today's reviews or if there are pending activities.

calendar.title: Class Calendar
calendar.description: View and manage your scheduled and makeup classes.
calendar.content1: The calendar centralizes your routine with FluencyLab:
calendar.item1: <strongNode>Active Bookings:</strongNode> Dates and times in blue represent your next scheduled classes.
calendar.item2: <strongNode>History & Status:</strongNode> Completed classes are shown in green, no-shows in yellow, and cancellations in gray.
calendar.item3: <strongNode>Reschedule or Cancel:</strongNode> Click on a scheduled class (blue) in the calendar to open its details and choose to reschedule or cancel it.

credits.title: Credits Balance
credits.description: Understand how booking works using your class credits.
credits.content1: Your monthly plan provides credits to schedule classes:
credits.item1: <strongNode>Credit Consumption:</strongNode> Each active booking consumes exactly 1 credit from your balance.
credits.item2: <strongNode>Makeup Credits:</strongNode> In case of a justified absence or teacher cancellation, the credit is returned for you to reschedule.

policy.title: Rescheduling Rules
policy.description: Monthly limits and deadlines to cancel without losing your credit.
policy.content1: We value the time of both our tutors and students:
policy.item1: <strongNode>Reschedule Limits:</strongNode> The sidebar shows how many reschedules you still have available for the current month.
policy.item2: <strongNode>Advance Notice:</strongNode> Cancellations made at the last minute (less than 4 hours before class) are considered no-shows and the credit is consumed.

notifications.title: Notification Preferences
notifications.description: Customize which reminders you want to receive.
notifications.content1: Never miss a class or break your daily study streak:
notifications.item1: <strongNode>WhatsApp Alerts:</strongNode> Enable to receive automatic reminders directly on your phone before classes start.
notifications.item2: <strongNode>Streak Reminders:</strongNode> Get notified to practice before your daily streak expires.

app.title: Install the App (PWA)
app.description: Access the platform with a single click from your home screen.
app.content1: You can use FluencyLab as a native application:
app.item1: <strongNode>Quick Installation:</strongNode> In the <strongNode>App</strongNode> tab, click install to add the icon to your phone or computer home screen.
app.item2: <strongNode>No Browser Needed:</strongNode> The app opens in full screen, uses less data, and loads much faster.

security.title: Security & Account
security.description: Change your password and update your personal information.
security.content1: Keep your account secure on the platform:
security.item1: <strongNode>Change Password:</strongNode> Create a new access password in the security tab at any time.
security.item2: <strongNode>Profile Data:</strongNode> Update your registered email or change your official display photo.

intro.title: Adaptive Placement Test
intro.description: How the FluencyLab level test works.
intro.content1: Our test dynamically evaluates your real communication skills:
intro.item1: <strongNode>Smart Questions:</strongNode> The test adapts to your answers. If you answer correctly, the difficulty increases; if you miss, the system recalculates.
intro.item2: <strongNode>Pedagogical Focus:</strongNode> We evaluate reading, grammar, vocabulary, and listening comprehension simultaneously.

resume.title: Save & Resume
resume.description: Your progress is protected against connection drops or interruptions.
resume.content1: You won't lose your progress if you need to stop:
resume.item1: <strongNode>Progress Saved:</strongNode> If the tab closes or connection is lost, your test session is paused.
resume.item2: <strongNode>Resume Test:</strongNode> Upon returning to the page, click <strongNode>Resume Test</strongNode> to continue exactly where you left off.

cooldown.title: Cooldown Period
cooldown.description: Why there is a minimum interval between tests.
cooldown.content1: The level test is designed to measure your pedagogical progress over time:
cooldown.item1: <strongNode>Cooldown Interval:</strongNode> After completing a test, you enter a cooldown period (usually 6 months) before you can take another.
cooldown.item2: <strongNode>Progress Tracking:</strongNode> This timeframe ensures you have enough time to study and see real improvements in your CEFR/ELO score.

history.title: Test History
history.description: Access the details of your previous level tests.
history.content1: Your completed tests are archived on the platform:
history.item1: <strongNode>Full Report:</strongNode> Click on any test in your history to open a complete report with ELO, CEFR levels, and detailed feedback.
history.item2: <strongNode>Skill Breakdown:</strongNode> View your detailed score in each of the four core communication areas.

shared.title: Shared Notes
shared.description: The space where your teacher records the notes from each class.
shared.content1: Class notebooks act as the official diary of your learning journey:
shared.item1: <strongNode>Real-Time Sync:</strongNode> Everything the teacher types during your online class appears instantly on your screen.
shared.item2: <strongNode>Advanced Search:</strongNode> Use the search bar to find words, grammar structures, or translations across any past class.

wotd.title: Word of the Day
wotd.description: A quick daily exercise to build vocabulary and earn extra XP.
wotd.content1: Get a new vocabulary term on your dashboard every day:
wotd.item1: <strongNode>Daily Challenge:</strongNode> Open the <strongNode>Word of the Day</strongNode> card to see the definition, phonetic spelling, and usage examples.
wotd.item2: <strongNode>Experience Bonus:</strongNode> Your first click of the day grants extra experience points (XP) toward your daily goal.

path.title: Learning Plan (Roadmap)
path.description: View the complete curriculum sequence planned for you.
path.content1: A structured path tailored to your specific goals:
path.item1: <strongNode>Sequential Modules:</strongNode> The lessons you need to complete are linked in a vertical timeline.
path.item2: <strongNode>Lesson Status:</strongNode> Easily see which topics are completed, in progress, or scheduled next.

stats.title: Learning Metrics
stats.description: Visual tracking of your study metrics.
stats.content1: Detailed insights from your adaptive practice:
stats.item1: <strongNode>Vocabulary & Retention:</strongNode> Track the total words learned and your estimated memory retention rate.
stats.item2: <strongNode>Completed Classes:</strongNode> Total meetings completed relative to the target planned for your study cycle.

NotebookSettings.title: Notebook Settings
NotebookSettings.description: Customize text reading and translation or verify your camera and microphone permissions.
NotebookSettings.languageDesc: By selecting a fixed language, read aloud and dictionary lookups will prioritize this language. Auto-detection will use the app's smart heuristics.
NotebookSettings.speedDesc: Adjust the speed of voice synthesis to listen to the pronunciation of selected texts.
NotebookSettings.devicePermissionsDesc: Verify if your browser has access to devices to participate in classes.
NotebookSettings.securityWarning: For security reasons, the browser does not allow changing blocked permissions programmatically. Follow the tutorial below to enable access:
NotebookSettings.chromeStep1: Click on the Lock (🔒) or Site Settings (⚙️) icon to the left of the URL in the address bar.
NotebookSettings.chromeStep2: Enable the switches or change to Allow for Camera and Microphone options.
NotebookSettings.chromeStep3: Click on the browser reload button or the button below to apply changes.
NotebookSettings.safariStep1: In the top Mac menu, select Safari > Settings for This Website...
NotebookSettings.safariStep2: Change the status of Camera and Microphone to Allow.
NotebookSettings.safariStep3: Or go to Settings > Websites in Safari's general preferences to manage globally.
NotebookSettings.firefoxStep1: Click on the permission icon (lock or shield) to the left of the site URL.
NotebookSettings.firefoxStep2: Remove the blocks by clicking the X next to "Temporarily Blocked".
NotebookSettings.firefoxStep3: Reload the page to trigger the access request again.
NotebookSettings.mobileStep2: Look for your browser in the app list (e.g. Safari or Chrome).
NotebookSettings.mobileStep3: Allow access to Camera and Microphone in the app's general settings.
NotebookSettings.mobileStep4: Return to the platform and reload this page.
NotebookSettings.toastBlocked: Access blocked. Follow the instructions below to reset permissions.
